title: rubus hirtus var. suboreades
intro: Rubus hirtus var. suboreades, also known as the Himalayan Raspberry or Himalayan Bramble, is a type of thorny shrub native to the Himalayan region. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Rubus hirtus var. suboreades include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support digestive health, as well as its antioxidant properties that can help protect against cell damage. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and its leaves, roots, and stems are used in various forms to extract its medicinal compounds.
